meaning: <拉> Sacrae Scripturae Doctor [宗]基督教<<圣经>>博士(=Doctor of Sacred Scripture)
examples: Q: I'm interested in getting a laptop with LED display and SSD drive.
So, what data should be placed on an SSD to maximize performance?
Samsung is trying to double SSD capacity every 12 months, he said.
Storage-wise, you're looking at a 128GB and 750GB SSD, or just the 750-gig HDD.
And yes, smoke does come out of the SSD when it is physically destroyed!
